## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Growth Lead position at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Erkan has extensive experience in growth, marketing, and AI-driven projects across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered marketing services, with plans to develop products for future knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [The role involves ownership of key growth initiatives, potentially including new service lines or community building](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest, with alignment on AI's potential and the need for human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

## Topics

### Erkan's Background and Experience

  - [Started in market research at 18, working with major firms like GFK, Ipsos, Nielsen](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Transitioned to marketing, focusing on SaaS and tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Developed a remote work visa project for countries like Dubai, Greece, and Albania during COVID](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Recent work with Fetch.ai, leading growth efforts and securing major partnerships (e.g., $40M Bosch project)](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Created AI-driven tools for YouTube content optimization and audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### GrowthX Overview and Jason's Role

  - [Jason leads go-to-market at GrowthX, splitting time between client work and growing GrowthX itself](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [GrowthX offers outsourced growth functions to companies like Webflow, Abnormal.ai, Vapi](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Current focus on content marketing and SEO, with plans to expand service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Company aims to build tools for "knowledge work of the future" powered by AI](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### Potential Role and Responsibilities

  - [Ownership of key growth initiatives within GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Possible focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
      - [Improving service delivery and product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [Marketing and go-to-market for GrowthX and parent company](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
      - [Developing and growing new service "workstreams" (e.g., link building, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [Community building (e.g., AIledgrowth.com initiative)](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

### Discussion on AI and Growth

  - [Both Jason and Erkan expressed strong belief in AI's potential to transform marketing and growth](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Emphasis on the need for human expertise to guide AI tools and interpret results](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach: focus on outcomes for clients while remaining flexible with tools and methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to circle back with Tucker (recruiter) regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [Potential take-home assignment to facilitate deeper discussion](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
  - [Erkan to email Jason with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
  - [Further discussion on salary expectations and role specifics may be needed](https://fathom.video/share/f4r5Z39Va31XznrB5qoH1XJR1WzKSDK3?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
